long_description:
[MON] Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_agents_not_sending_metrics.html
TIP Situation: Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics
TIP Short Description: The Sysdig agent pod is Ready on node tor3-qz1-sr1-rk059-s13 in mzone2s7 but it is not exposing any metrics
TIP Console: toc
TIP Self Healing: true
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds: 4200
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:ca-tor::mzone2s7:pod:sysdig-agent-compute-nw2xq
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    count by (kube_pod_name, kube_node_name, kube_cluster_name, agent_tag_crn_location) (kube_pod_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"sysdig-agent.*", kube_pod_condition="true"} == 1 AND on (kube_node_name) (kube_node_info{agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl.*|rias", agent_tag_cluster=~"mzone.*"} unless on (kube_node_name) label_replace (sysdig_host_up{agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl.*|rias.*"}, "kube_node_name", "$1", "host_hostname", "(.+)"))) > 0 = 1
Segment:
    agent_tag_crn_location = 'ca-tor' and kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2s7' and kube_node_name = 'tor3-qz1-sr1-rk059-s13' and kube_pod_name = 'sysdig-agent-compute-nw2xq'

Time:             12/05/2025 02:42 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://ca-tor.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/882c889f-46cb-4d67-985f-c8e922c6a550?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F14706540%2Fdetails
